paragraphs.source: The device base is massive but mature. Apple now ships over 600 million devices annually across all categories. But growth rates tell a different story: the 20%+ annual growth of 2020-2021 has compressed to around 3% through the forecast period. The portfolio is collectively plateauing.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The device base is massive but mature. Apple now ships over 600 million devices annually across all categories. But growth rates tell a different story: the 20%+ annual growth of 2020-2021 has compressed to around 3% through the forecast period. The portfolio is collectively plateauing.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The device base is massive but mature. Apple now ships over 600 million devices annually across all categories. But growth rates tell a different story: the 20%+ annual growth of 2020-2021 has compressed to around 3% through the forecast period. The portfolio is collectively plateauing.

pro.text: 设备基数庞大但已趋于成熟。苹果目前全品类设备年出货量已超 6 亿台。但增长率却揭示了另一番景象：2020 至 2021 年间超 20% 的年增长率，在预测期内已压缩至 3% 左右。整体产品组合正步入平台期。

issues.description:
1. 术语微调：'silicon intensity' 译为'硅含量'略显生硬，容易让人联想到化学成分（如钢材的硅含量）。在半导体商业分析语境中，通常译作'含硅量'或'单机含硅量'（指单台设备消耗的硅片面积/芯片价值）。
2. 格式问题：'C系列'中的英文字母与中文字符之间缺失空格。

paragraphs.source: iPhone volumes peaked nearly a decade ago and have oscillated in a narrow band ever since. The forecast through 2030 shows low-single-digit growth, barely keeping pace with population. iPhone drives the majority of unit volumes but contributes almost nothing to incremental device growth.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: iPhone volumes peaked nearly a decade ago and have oscillated in a narrow band ever since. The forecast through 2030 shows low-single-digit growth, barely keeping pace with population. iPhone drives the majority of unit volumes but contributes almost nothing to incremental device growth.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: iPhone volumes peaked nearly a decade ago and have oscillated in a narrow band ever since. The forecast through 2030 shows low-single-digit growth, barely keeping pace with population. iPhone drives the majority of unit volumes but contributes almost nothing to incremental device growth.

pro.text: iPhone 出货量在近十年前便已触顶，此后始终在窄幅震荡。到 2030 年的预测显示其仅有低个位数增长，勉强跟上人口增速。iPhone 贡献了绝大部分出货量，但对增量设备增长几乎毫无贡献。

paragraphs.source: Wearables carried growth, then stalled. AirPods was the fastest-ramping product in Apple’s history, reaching meaningful scale within four years of launch. Watch followed a similar trajectory. Both categories have since plateaued, with growth rates compressing to low-single-digits by 2025.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Wearables carried growth, then stalled. AirPods was the fastest-ramping product in Apple’s history, reaching meaningful scale within four years of launch. Watch followed a similar trajectory. Both categories have since plateaued, with growth rates compressing to low-single-digits by 2025.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Wearables carried growth, then stalled. AirPods was the fastest-ramping product in Apple’s history, reaching meaningful scale within four years of launch. Watch followed a similar trajectory. Both categories have since plateaued, with growth rates compressing to low-single-digits by 2025.

pro.text: 可穿戴设备曾拉动增长，随后陷入停滞。AirPods 是苹果历史上起量最快的产品，发布不到四年便形成可观规模。Watch 也经历了类似轨迹。此后这两大品类均步入平台期，到 2025 年其增长率将压缩至低个位数。

issues.description:

paragraphs.source: New categories are not moving the needle. Vision Pro shipments through 2030 remain a rounding error relative to the 600M+ device base. Its contribution is silicon intensity, primarily. The C-series chips powering spatial computing consume wafer capacity disproportionate to device shipments.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: New categories are not moving the needle. Vision Pro shipments through 2030 remain a rounding error relative to the 600M+ device base. Its contribution is silicon intensity, primarily. The C-series chips powering spatial computing consume wafer capacity disproportionate to device shipments.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: New categories are not moving the needle. Vision Pro shipments through 2030 remain a rounding error relative to the 600M+ device base. Its contribution is silicon intensity, primarily. The C-series chips powering spatial computing consume wafer capacity disproportionate to device shipments.

pro.text: 新品类影响甚微。相对于超 6 亿台的设备基数，到 2030 年 Vision Pro 的出货量仍只是个零头。其主要贡献在于硅含量。驱动空间计算的 C系列芯片消耗了与其设备出货量极不相称的晶圆产能。

paragraphs.source: Server appears in the forecast. A new “Server” line item emerges in 2024 and grows through 2030. Volumes are small, but the category’s existence signals Apple’s datacenter silicon ambitions (Baltra) are more than rumors.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Server appears in the forecast. A new “Server” line item emerges in 2024 and grows through 2030. Volumes are small, but the category’s existence signals Apple’s datacenter silicon ambitions (Baltra) are more than rumors.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Server appears in the forecast. A new “Server” line item emerges in 2024 and grows through 2030. Volumes are small, but the category’s existence signals Apple’s datacenter silicon ambitions (Baltra) are more than rumors.

pro.text: 预测数据中出现了服务器的身影。2024 年新增了“服务器”单列项目，并将在 2030 年前持续增长。虽然出货量较小，但该品类的存在表明，苹果的数据中心芯片野心（Baltra）绝非空穴来风。

2. 格式问题：'C系列'中的英文字母与中文字符之间缺失空格。

paragraphs.source: The 2025-2030 growth outlook is muted. Total device shipment growth averages around 3% annually through the forecast, down from double-digits earlier in the decade. Apple’s wafer demand growth will increasingly decouple from device unit growth, driven by silicon intensity per device rather than more devices shipped.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The 2025-2030 growth outlook is muted. Total device shipment growth averages around 3% annually through the forecast, down from double-digits earlier in the decade. Apple’s wafer demand growth will increasingly decouple from device unit growth, driven by silicon intensity per device rather than more devices shipped.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The 2025-2030 growth outlook is muted. Total device shipment growth averages around 3% annually through the forecast, down from double-digits earlier in the decade. Apple’s wafer demand growth will increasingly decouple from device unit growth, driven by silicon intensity per device rather than more devices shipped.

pro.text: 2025 至 2030 年的增长前景疲软。在预测期内，设备总出货量年均增长率约为 3%，远不及本年代初的两位数增速。苹果的晶圆需求增长将日益与设备出货量增长脱钩，其驱动力在于单台设备的硅含量，而非出货量的增加。
